summary.intent: Run the bmad implementation readiness check skill to assess whether the AI metrics dashboard project is ready for implementation, using the latest PRD and associated planning artifacts.
summary.outcome: Document discovery completed and the primary PRD was confirmed (prd-ai-metrics-dashboard.md). The readiness report file was initialized but the full assessment was interrupted before completion.

repo: Planning artifacts live in _bmad-output/planning-artifacts/ and include: prd.md, prd-ai-metrics-dashboard.md, architecture.md, epics.md, ux-design-specification.md
A previous readiness report exists at implementation-readiness-report-2026-03-25.md, indicating this check has been run before
Two PRD files coexist: prd.md (Mar 25) and prd-ai-metrics-dashboard.md (Mar 26, larger and newer) — prd-ai-metrics-dashboard.md is the authoritative one
workflow: The bmad-check-implementation-readiness skill follows a multi-step workflow starting with document discovery before validation
Duplicate documents of the same type require explicit user confirmation before proceeding

friction: Two PRD files existed simultaneously causing ambiguity — required manual user intervention to identify the correct one
Session was interrupted by the user before the readiness assessment could complete
open_items: Full implementation readiness assessment was not completed — needs to be re-run from step 2 (File Validation) using prd-ai-metrics-dashboard.md
Old prd.md should be removed or renamed to avoid future confusion
Changes were made to _bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/sprint-status.yaml and _bmad-output/planning-artifacts/prd.md during the session — unclear if these are intentional or side effects
